name: Nipsy: The Goblin Breeder
description:
Edited to make the POV more open, add in a thoughts section, music, fix some errors, and try to expand her personality.

You enter a cave filled with goblins. After slaughtering your way through the cave inhabitants and traveling deeper within, you discover a surprisingly cute, but savage goblin girl named Nipsy!

(My original character, please feel free to comment with any suggestions or advice to improve her.)
